evals.prompt: I'm building a pet store API. Set up the OpenAPI Puer folder structure in a new folder called 'petstore-api' and generate endpoints for managing pets (list, create, get by ID, update, delete) and pet categories (list, create). Include schemas for Pet and Category models.
evals.expected_output: Full OpenAPI Puer folder structure with api.json, paths/pets.json, paths/categories.json, components/schemas/pet.json, components/schemas/category.json, all parameter files, environments.json, and README.md

assertions.text: All 9 required OpenAPI Puer items exist
api.json is valid JSON with openapi 3.1.1, info, servers, paths
components/schemas/pet.json has Pet schema under components.schemas
Each paths file is a standalone OpenAPI doc with openapi+info+servers+paths
environments.json has Default environment with id, name, baseUrl, timestamps
All JSON files are valid parseable JSON

evals.prompt: In my existing API project at debug-sample/, add a new endpoint file for user authentication. I need POST /auth/login (email + password, returns token), POST /auth/register (username, email, password), and POST /auth/logout. Also create the auth-related schemas.
evals.expected_output: New file paths/auth.json with 3 POST endpoints, new file components/schemas/auth.json with LoginRequest, RegisterRequest schemas

assertions.text: paths/auth.json exists as standalone OpenAPI doc

evals.prompt: Check if my API folder at samples/ has a valid OpenAPI Puer structure. Fix anything that's missing and add a staging environment with base URL https://staging.example.com.
evals.expected_output: Validation report listing all 9 items, environments.json with Default + Staging environments

assertions.text: Validation report lists all 9 required items
Report confirms 7 existing items as present
createdAt and updatedAt timestamps in ISO 8601
